# PR Review: #27932 - [iOS][Shell] Fix navigation lifecycle and back button for More tab (>5 tabs)

---

<details>
<summary><strong>📋 Issue Summary</strong></summary>

**Primary Issue ([#27799](https://github.com/dotnet/maui/issues/27799)): OnAppearing and OnNavigatedTo does not work when using extended Tabbar (tabbar with more than 5 tabs) on iOS**

When loading a page from the extended tabbar (More tab with >5 tabs):
- `OnAppearing` and `OnNavigatedTo` fire correctly on first navigation
- On 2nd page load, only `OnAppearing` fires, `OnNavigatedTo` does not
- Back button: neither event fires
- `Shell.Current.GoToAsync("..")`: only `OnAppearing` fires, not `OnNavigatedTo`
- Events become random/unreliable after these operations

**Related Issues (PR fixes 4 total):**
- [#27800](https://github.com/dotnet/maui/issues/27800): Shell.BackButtonBehavior does not work with extended Tabbar
- [#30862](https://github.com/dotnet/maui/issues/30862): Shell TabBar More button causes ViewModel command binding disconnection  
- [#31166](https://github.com/dotnet/maui/issues/31166): OnAppearing not firing if tabs are on the more tab

**Steps to Reproduce:**
1. Create Shell app with >5 tabs in TabBar (More button appears)
2. Navigate to page through More tab
3. Navigate to sub-page
4. Use back button or `GoToAsync("..")`
5. Observe: lifecycle events don't fire, back button behavior doesn't work

**Platforms Affected:**
- [x] iOS (all issues)
- [ ] Android (works fine)
- [ ] Windows
- [ ] MacCatalyst

**Regression**: Not sure, did not test other versions

**Root Cause (from PR description):** When `IsInMoreTab` is true, `PushViewController` and `PopViewController` delegate to `UITabBarController.MoreNavigationController` instead of the base navigation controller. The `MoreNavigationController` doesn't use our `NavDelegate`, so `DidShowViewController` never fires, leaving navigation completion tasks incomplete.

</details>
